name: Myelin Sentinel Extension
description: Browser-side controls for the Myelin Sentinel agent and audit APIs.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:8000 http://127.0.0.1:8000 http://localhost:9000 http://127.0.0.1:9000; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'
